comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Iteration 1 setup: created Ralph migration epic tau-4kav plus child tasks for tests/schema-service/adapter/gate. Baseline check: current ralph-fresh-session helper suite passes via `cd extensions/tau && npx vitest run test/ralph-fresh-session.test.ts`. Investigation split for freeze pass: store coverage for state/task/archive helpers, adapter coverage for /ralph commands/tools/events with mocked ExtensionAPI, and service/controller coverage for finalize + iteration state transitions. Current high-risk seams remain sync fs helpers, module globals (agentRuntime/currentLoop), and the single-shot agentEnd Promise handshake in src/ralph/index.ts.

comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Completed freeze-pass regression coverage for Ralph. Added test/ralph-store.test.ts, test/ralph-service.test.ts, and test/ralph-adapter.test.ts while keeping test/ralph-fresh-session.test.ts. Coverage now locks start/task+state creation, controller-side and tool-side subagent blocking, resume + finalize handshake, completion marker closure, archive/clean/nuke, session ownership resolution, and command-owned session actions. Verified with `cd extensions/tau && npx vitest run test/ralph-fresh-session.test.ts test/ralph-store.test.ts test/ralph-service.test.ts test/ralph-adapter.test.ts` and `cd extensions/tau && npm run gate`. Review loop result: spec PASS, quality APPROVED. Filed follow-up bug tau-xvkb for the archive basename prefix edge case discovered during this pass.
